problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
